function.name: assessCareerStage

efforts_so_far.description: Summary of caller's answer to Q2 (What have you tried?) — what approaches and activities they've undertaken

desired_outcome.description: Summary of caller's answer to Q3 (What's the goal?) — what success looks like for them

urgency_signals.description: Inferred urgency: low (exploring), medium (active search), high (need results soon), crisis (laid off / financial pressure)

current_situation.description: Summary of caller's answer to Q1 (Where are you right now?) — their current career status and what prompted the call

function.description: Process diagnostic question answers to determine caller's career stage, pain points, and urgency. Call after completing the 3 diagnostic questions. Also trigger if caller seems stuck or confused after 2+ exchanges without clear direction.

function.name: getCareerRecommendations

pain_points.description: Specific pain points identified during diagnostic (e.g. 'not_tailoring_resume', 'no_networking', 'interview_anxiety', 'career_direction_unclear')

primary_stage.description: Caller's primary career stage from assessment

function.description: Get stage-appropriate career coaching recommendations, next steps, and relevant knowledge base topics. Call after assessCareerStage returns results.

function.name: explainCareerConcept

concept.description: Career concept to explain. Valid concepts include: master-resume, aiss-bullets, resume-customization, ats-systems, cover-letter-strategy, networking-cold-outreach, linkedin-strategy, interview-prep-start-format, art-of-the-brag, self-reflection, groundwork-checklist, four-levers, career-services-reality, job-market-stats, ai-in-hiring, creating-your-own-internship, thank-you-messages, materials-preparation

caller_stage.description: Caller's assessed stage, so explanation can be tailored to their level

function.description: Pull a career coaching concept from V's knowledge base and deliver it conversationally. Use when caller asks about a specific topic, or to support a recommendation with V's philosophy.

function.name: requestCareerSession

reason.description: Why they want a session — what specific help they need beyond what the hotline can provide

contact.description: Caller's email or phone number for follow-up

pain_points.description: Key pain points to pass to the coach for session prep

function.description: Escalate to a Careerspan career coaching session booking. Use when the caller expresses interest in deeper help, or when the value prop tree suggests it's the right moment. Provides booking link and captures contact info.

function.name: collectFeedback

rating.description: 1-5 rating if caller provides one (optional — don't push for a number)

helpful.description: Whether the caller found the call helpful

feedback_text.description: Any specific feedback or suggestions the caller shares

would_recommend.description: Whether they'd recommend the hotline to others (only if they volunteer this)

function.description: Collect caller feedback at the end of the call. Trigger naturally: 'Before you go — was this helpful? Anything I could do better?' Same pattern as Zoseph's feedback collection.

function.name: lookupCaller

phone_number.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +15551234567)

function.description: Check if the caller's phone number matches a Fillout intake form submission. Call at the start of every conversation to personalize the greeting. If matched, the AI should greet by name and reference their submitted info.
